source.name: Zen's Apps
source.subtitle: Custom apps for LiveContainer
source.description: Source for sideloaded apps built via GitHub Actions CI.

apps.name: Tidal Downloader
apps.subtitle: Download and play music from Tidal
apps.localizedDescription: A Flutter iOS app that embeds CPython to run tiddl (Tidal music downloader) on-device. Features streaming playback with varispeed, library management, playlist support, and search with album art.

apps.name: Fritz!Box Tools
apps.subtitle: Device list and mesh pairing for Fritz!Box
apps.localizedDescription: WebView app with a local Dart proxy server for managing Fritz!Box routers. Features PBKDF2/MD5 authentication, device listing, and remote mesh pairing via WPS.
